name: self-testing-platform
description: MERN self-testing platform — see QUICKSTART.md for zero-config local run

scripts.setup: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && docker compose up -d && node server/scripts/wait-for-mongo.mjs && npm run seed --prefix server
scripts.setup:lite: node server/scripts/wait-for-mongo.mjs && npm run seed --prefix server
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
